news.t: 10 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains
7 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains

holdings.infoBox: DSTL is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are AbbVie stock at 2.96%, QUALCOMM at 2.84%, Merck & Co. at 2.63%, Salesforce at 1.80%, and Booking Holdings at 1.79%.

overview.description: The Distillate US Fundamental Stability & Value ETF (DSTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively selects large-cap stocks that score favourably for financial indebtedness, fundamental stability, and valuation. DSTL was launched on Oct 24, 2018 and is issued by Distillate.
infoTable: Distillate U.S. Fundamental Stability & Value Index

data.title: 10 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains
data.text: Value stocks are finally having their day, and many expect the run to continue. These are the best value ETFs to leverage this long-awaited revival.

data.title: 7 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains
data.text: Value stocks might finally have their day – and that means great things for a host of long-maligned value exchange-traded funds (ETFs). Growth has been running up the score against value for more than...
